allow: Bash(printf '%s\\n' '- [Grant Seeker project]\(grant-seeker-project.md\) — goals + architecture decisions for the flood-funding scout agent')

PowerShell($keys = @\('HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Command Processor','HKLM:\\Software\\Microsoft\\Command Processor'\); foreach \($k in $keys\) { try { $v = \(Get-ItemProperty -Path $k -Name AutoRun -ErrorAction Stop\).AutoRun; "[$k] AutoRun = $v" } catch { "[$k] no AutoRun" } })
